title: Floral Chewy Adventurous Russian Stir-fry
description: A floral and chewy Russian dish featuring shrimp paste with a unique caramelization technique, vegan-friendly and paleo option.
instructions: Peel and dice the sweet potato into small cubes.
Chop ginger finely and mince garlic cloves.
Wipe spinach clean, remove tough stems, and chop into smaller pieces.
Heat coconut oil in a pan over medium heat. Add shrimp paste and cook for 2-3 minutes until fragrant and lightly colored.
Add diced sweet potato to the pan and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until tender.
Stir in chopped spinach, ginger, garlic, and sesame seeds. Cook together for another 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt according to taste. Serve hot.
